results.title: EQT Corporation AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
EQT Corporation is America's largest natural gas producer and the only large-scale, vertically integrated natural gas company[1], positioning itself at the center of the AI energy revolution. The company has secured major deals to supply natural gas for data centers, including a 665,000 MMBtu/d agreement with the Homer City Energy Campus and an 800 MMcf/d deal with another Pennsylvania data center[2]. EQT's strategic partnership with Context Labs leverages machine learning and AI capabilities for emissions tracking and verification[3], while the company emphasizes its digital-first operations with real-time analytics and AI-driven optimization[4]. CEO Toby Rice views AI as the 'biggest new source of demand' for natural gas, with the company targeting the growing power needs of data centers across Appalachia[5].

### AI-Powered Operational Optimization

Machine learning and AI integration across drilling and production operations
...
Real-time drilling data capture, machine learning tools for geosteering and completion design, and advanced production optimization to reduce drilling times and increase recovery rates
...
How is EQT using AI in its natural gas operations?
...
EQT uses AI for real-time drilling data capture, machine learning tools for geosteering and completion design, advanced production optimization, and emissions tracking through its partnership with Context Labs' AI-powered platform.
...
EQT's digital transformation support AI initiatives?
...
EQT operates a cloud-based digital work environment with AI analytics, tracking over 3,000 operational metrics in real-time and using machine learning for operational optimization across its production assets.
...
Key partnerships include Context Labs for AI-powered emissions tracking and verification, Homer City Redevelopment for AI data center energy supply, and Blackstone for a $3.5 billion joint venture supporting AI infrastructure.
...
CEO Toby Rice sees AI as the 'biggest new source of demand' for natural gas, with EQT positioning to supply the reliable, 24/7 energy needed for AI data centers and computing infrastructure.

results.title: Senior EPM Transformation Specialist | Hirevector
highlights:
# Senior EPM Transformation Specialist
...
, 2026
...
- Join our Qrew! EQT is seeking a Senior EPM Transformation Specialist to join our Corporate Accounting team. This role designs and delivers solutions across OneStream, Workiva and Databricks th at automate close, consolidation and management reporting. You will partner with Finance, Treasury, Tax, IT and external vendors to build governed data pipelines, reduce manual effort and strengthen controls.
...
- This position requires a solid accounting foundation; hands-on OneStream build experience and comfort working across data engineering and connected reporting. You will translate business processes into scalable apps, document controls and ensure results are accurately reflected in EQT’s financial statements.
...
- EQT continues to invest in automation and analytics. You will play a key role in sequencing and delivering these initiatives while working closely with senior leadership, external partners and cross-functional teams.
...
- Build governed pipelines in Databricks that pull data from ERPs then shape clean curated tables for OneStream and Workiva Wdata.
- Orchestrate jobs with validations and full lineage from source to report.
- Use a version-controlled release process to pro mote changes from dev to test to prod with automated checks and quick rollback.
...
- Stand up Wdata Tables, Queries and Chains to feed Workiva spreadsheets and documents for management and SEC reporting.
- Deliver interactive reporting packs and dashboards and enable self-service for Finance power users.
- Appl y RPA and AI assist fo r reconciliations, anomaly detection and narrative preparation.
...
- 4–7 years in EPM or financial systems.
- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Mathematics, or a closely related field.
- Practical Databricks skills with SQL or Python fundamentals.
- Strong SQL and data modeling and knowledge of ERPs and financial data structures.
- Understanding of accounting and financial reporting concepts.
- Clear written and verbal communication with the ability to
...
into designs.
...
Preferred experience and skills

- Experience with Workiva Wdata or connected reporting.
- Hands-on OneStream configuration and build experience preferred.
- CPA or prior accounting experience is a plus.
- Energy industry exposure is a plus.

Activity: Andrew Davis
...
#TAWeek
...
recruitment marketing is
...
A few key takeaways:
...
🔹 AI is reshaping job search.
...
Candidates aren’t just browsing job boards; they’re asking AI to summarize what it’s like to work somewhere. That means we’re not only writing for people anymore, we’re teaching AI how to describe our companies. Clear, consistent, structured messaging matters more than ever.
...
🔹 Precision beats generic messaging.
...
Field roles and corporate roles value different things. Candidates want clarity; including what’s challenging about the work, not just polished language.
...
🔹 The career site is our most important employer brand asset.
...
It’s the front door. It should be story-driven, grounded in real employee voices, and structured so both candidates and AI understand who we are.
...
Big takeaway: credibility and consistency are competitive advantages. When story, experience, and reality align, perception follows!
...
Grateful for
...
insights… and
...
Vitamin D 🙂 #TAWeek

highlights:
Senior EPM Transformation Specialist at [EQT Corporation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/eqt-corporation)
...
I’m a Principal Data Scientist with expertise in the Utility industry, Finance, Insurance, Risk, and Commodities Trading. My key strengths include Statistical Modeling, Programming, Optimization, Problem Solving, and attention to detail. My most recent position was Principal Data Scientist at American Electric Power where I was responsible for building a data analytics program within the Audit Services group. While I was there, I drove the increase in the usage of data analysis on very few audits to every audit where data analysis was possible, resulting in more thorough audits, quicker audits, and larger contract and fraud recoveries through training and mentoring staff and implementing the analyses. My career history includes thirteen years in risk management at American Electric Power, when I managed risks associated with interest rates, commodities trading, power plant operation, and insurance. One of the ways I am most proud of how I used my strengths is that I built statistical models for capacity performance, automobile liability, general liability, worker’s compensation, and property claims, which were used to price and procure insurance and to manage

results.title: CCUS Reservoir Engineer III/Senior/Expert/Advisor | Hirevector
highlights:
CCUS Reservoir Engineer III/Senior/Expert/Advisor | Hirevector
...
# CCUS Reservoir Engineer III/Senior/Expert/Advisor
...
Posted Jun 20, 2026
...
EQT is one of the United States' leading producers of natural gas and the first traditional energy company of scale in the world to achieve Net Zero on a Scope 1 and Scope 2 basis.
...
At EQT, we are making strides toward becoming the best producer by creating long-term value for all stakeholders, including employees, landowners, communities, industry partners and investors. Our vision is to evolve EQT into a modern, connected, digitally enabled organization.
...
This role will be part of the Reservoir engineering team, supporting the Program Director for CCUS and serving as the technical lead for reservoir engineering and subsurface modeling activities supporting EQT's carbon capture, utilization, and storage (CCUS) initiatives. The role will focus on reservoir characterization, simulation, injection forecasting, storage capacity assessment, and optimization of Class VI and Class II CO₂ storage and enhanced oil and gas recovery (ER) projects.
...
The CCUS Reservoir Engineer III/Senior/Expert/Advisor responsibilities include but are not limited to:
...
Develop and apply reservoir simulation models to evaluate CO₂ injection performance, plume migration, pressure response, storage efficiency, and long-term containment for Class VI and Class II projects.
...
technical reservoir engineering evaluations
...
CCUS strategy
...
Analyze and interpret field test data, injection performance, pressure transient behavior, and production response to calibrate reservoir models and improve predictive capability.
...
Quantify and update CO₂ storage
...
Advance EQT's technical capabilities in CO₂ storage and enhanced recovery (ER) reservoir modeling through benchmarking, workflow development, and integration of industry best practices.
...
Lead reservoir modeling and simulation efforts for Class II enhanced recovery projects and associated CO₂ storage in depleted Marcellus and Utica reservoirs.
...
Develop static and dynamic reservoir models to evaluate injectivity, containment, pressure management, recovery performance, and long-term storage behavior.
...
Generate injection and production forecasts to
...
Collaborate with Geoscience, Completions, and Reservoir Engineering teams to integrate data and improve subsurface understanding and model accuracy.
...
Required Experience and Skills:
...
Minimum of 5 years of reservoir engineering experience with demonstrated expertise in reservoir simulation, forecasting, and subsurface analysis; experience in unconventional and conventional reservoirs is preferred.
...
Bachelor's degree in Petroleum Engineering or related engineering field required; Master's degree is preferred.
...
Direct experience with CO₂ storage, enhanced recovery, or gas reservoir development projects preferred.
...
Strong background in reservoir modeling for Class II and/or Class VI applications, including injection forecasting, pressure management, and storage capacity estimation.
...
Familiarity with the Class VI permitting process/requirements and experience supporting the preparation of Class VI permit applications, including the requisite modeling and technical documentation.
...
Experience with dynamic simulation tools and integrated reservoir characterization workflows.
...
Experience supporting injection well design, injectivity evaluation, and workover planning.

results.title: Jeff Quiring
highlights:
I’m a Senior Drilling Services Engineer specializing in analytics, KPI reporting, and data-driven decision support for upstream energy operations. My role sits at the intersection of drilling operations, finance, and enterprise data systems, translating complex operational workflows into dashboards, automated reporting, and actionable insights for leadership and field teams. I began my career in the field as an MWD, working on rigs and gaining hands-on operational experience. That background helps me bridge the gap between field operations and data, ensuring analytics reflect real-world workflows, costs, and performance drivers. At EQT, I focus on Power BI dashboard development, SQL and Databricks querying, WellView data management and auditing, and automation of operational reporting. I leverage Salesforce extensively for operational data tracking, workflow management, and integration of drilling and services data across teams. I support drilling cost and performance tracking, budgeting and accrual workflows, and high-value drilling services invoice review, helping ensure data accuracy and visibility across drilling programs. I build automated workflows, including end-of-well reporting, to streamline communication and improve data accessibility for operations and leadership. I also use AI tools such as ChatGPT and Claude to accelerate analytics development, SQL workflows, and automation scripts, enabling rapid prototyping and deployment while maintaining strong business logic and validation. I’m passionate about operational analytics, enterprise reporting, and building tools that help teams and leadership easily understand performance, costs, and opportunities for improvement across upstream operations.

Senior Gen AI Engineer and Lead engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and optimizing LLM-enabled data platforms across AWS, GCP, Azure, and Snowflake environments. Strong expertise in Big Data ecosystems including Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Kafka, Airflow, and dbt, with a focus on building AI/LLM-ready data architectures. Proven experience developing end-to-end ELT/ETL pipelines for structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data, enabling Generative AI, RAG-based analytics, and intelligent data applications at enterprise scale. Hands-on experience with Snowflake data warehousing, including Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, performance tuning, cost optimization, data governance, and secure data access for AI workloads. Extensive experience with workflow orchestration using Apache Airflow, Cloud Composer, and dbt Cloud, supporting AI-driven data processing and real-time analytics. Experience building real-time and batch processing pipelines using Spark, Dataflow, and Kafka Streams, enabling low-latency data delivery for AI/LLM systems. Strong understanding of data quality, governance, and AI-ready validation frameworks, ensuring reliable and audit-compliant datasets. Built and optimized data pipelines to support AI/ML and LLM workloads, ensuring high-quality, scalable, and low-latency feature delivery. # Data Scientist
...
Job Title: Data Scientist
...
Location: Monroeville, Pennsylvania
...
Full-time Professional
...
As a Data Scientist at BPMI, you will work under normal supervision and perform semi-complex critical technical functions to execute the BPMI mission in areas including, but not limited to applying data analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning techniques to generate actionable insights that drive business decisions. This role involves collecting, analyzing, and interpreting both structured and unstructured data to support business solutions and operational improvements. Collaboration with cross-functional teams is key to identifying business challenges, developing predictive models, and communicating findings through reports, dashboards, and presentations. Continuous learning and adapting to emerging trends and technologies in data science are essential to fostering a data-driven culture within BPMI. The role ensures data accuracy, optimizes processes for efficiency, and works with stakeholders to enhance decision-making and business performance.
...
Essential Duties:
...
- Prepare, analyze, and interpret data from various sources using statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and computational techniques.
- Develop and maintain predictive models, analytical applications, and data pipelines to support business and engineering solutions.
- Collaborate with data owners to scope problems and implement data-driven solutions.
- Analyze both structured and unstructured data sets, ensuring statistical significance and accuracy in results.
...
- Present findings and insights in clear, accessible visuals such as reports, dashboards, and presentations.
...
- Contribute to knowledge sharing and documentation to promote learning within teams.
...
- Stay informed on emerging data science trends and technologies to improve methods and techniques.
- Apply data science methods to improve decision-making and operational efficiency.
...
- Participate in software development projects, including writing and testing code.
...
- Implement basic configuration management practices to track changes in code and data.
...
Minimum Job Requirements:
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related technical degree from an accredited college or university.
- A minimum of two (2) years of relevant experience.
- Ten (10) or more years of completed education and/or relevant experience may be considered to satisfy educational and years of experience requirements.
- Requires a security clearance; however, all qualified candidates will be considered regardless of their current clearance status. The ability to obtain and maintain a Department of Energy security clearance is required.
...
